summary: Updated integration tests for Zozie rename + credit system. 68/68 pass (was 51). Changes: (1) System prompt test checks for 'Zozie' not 'V'. (2) Webhook structural test uses 'Zozie (Career Coach)' name + Deepgram keyword. (3) Table count updated 5→7 (added caller_balances, purchases). (4) Added 3c: caller_balances CRUD + balance check logic (8 tests — defaults, free tier deduction, purchased deduction, allowed/blocked states, new caller fallback). (5) Added 3d: purchases CRUD + accumulation + product-to-minutes mapping (4 tests). (6) Added 3e: deduction logic unit tests (5 tests — free-first priority, split deduction, seconds→minutes conversion, E.164 normalization).
broadcast: 68/68 tests pass. Credit system fully covered: balance gating, free tier, purchased minutes, deduction logic, product mapping.
